text:
Not everything is good in Sweden. I say that often, and I mean it

But wow. Also:

Clean everywhere. Not fake clean - actually clean

Nature accessible to all, not just those who can afford it

World class tech, music, defense, gaming and more

You can walk most places, including alone at night

Well-kept architecture without being sterile

People composed and respectful without being cold

Children raised with real freedom and independence early

Women equal in the workplace, in the home, in public life, generations ahead of most of the world

Parental leave that actually works

Class doesn't define you the way it does in the UK or France

High trust, people help their neighbors and follow rules because they believe in the collective, not because they're forced to

Silence and nature treated as something restorative, not uncomfortable

You can leave things the way you found them and expect others to do the same

--

Worth to remember and fight for

legacy.description:
